case_title: JOSEPH ANTHONY BARSSE VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF UC REGENTS BY TIM REBBERT (PLC REP) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA
PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE BY DEFENDANTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 170.6) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BARSEE AND TIM REBBERT, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT, PARTIES PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. NOT REPORTED. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2019 BY JEFFREY S. ROSS; CLERK: R. GOULDING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR ON APR-30-2019 AT 1:45 PM IN DEPT. 502, JUDGE JEFFREY ROSS. (206)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARSSE, JOSEPH ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARSSE, JOSEPH ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BARSSE, JOSEPH ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
LETTER RECIEVED : DEFENDANT REGENTS OFFER TO COMPROMISE. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE BY DEFENDANTS UPHELD. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
